post.summary: Create a Stripe Checkout session for the current cart
Create a review (purchase-gated, one per user per product)

url.description: Stripe hosted checkout URL to redirect the customer to

orderId.description: Local order id created in PENDING state

currency.description: Currency this order was charged in

status.description: Status after cancelling. CANCELLED for an unpaid order; PAID for a paid order whose refund is in flight (flips to REFUNDED via webhook).

refundId.description: Stripe refund id when a paid order was refunded
